Based on the retrieved content from the quarterly report, here are the key highlights:

**Revenue Performance:**
- Q4 2025 Revenue: **$12.4 million** (up 18% year-over-year)
- Operating Margin: **22%**
- Q1 2026 Forecast: **$14.1 million** projected

The company demonstrated solid growth with an 18% increase in revenue compared to the same period last year, alongside a healthy operating margin of 22%. Looking ahead, management projects continued momentum into Q1 2026 with expected revenue of $14.1 million.
